name: Radial progress

en.when_to_use: Use it to emphasize one completion percentage, quota usage rate, or goal attainment rate, such as migration progress, course completion, or a quarterly target. To compare several proportions, use a bar chart or multi-metric panel; to show change over time, use a line chart.
en.why_valuable: One key proportion buried in text or a table does not create visual focus; this component establishes clear hierarchy with an accessible ring, central value, short label, and explanation, while normalizing input to value/max.

data_in.note: data represents one part-to-whole ratio. value is clamped to 0-max; max must be greater than 0 and defaults to 100. The ring draws value/max. centerLabel changes only the central display text, not actual progress or the accessible value. tone controls the semantic color of the ring and status pill.

schema.title?: string -- card title; displays "Progress" when omitted
schema.max?: number -- total, must be greater than 0; default 100
schema.centerLabel?: string -- primary center text; displays the calculated percentage when omitted
schema.label?: string -- short label below the primary center text, also used as the progress bar's accessible name
schema.caption?: string -- one or two contextual sentences below the ring
schema.tone?: 'accent'|'positive'|'warning'|'negative' -- semantic color for ring and status; default accent

spec.note: The single card grows with title, caption, and status; the ring is at most about 230px and scales down on narrow screens. No fixed height, vh, or carrier measurement.

when_to_use: 需要突出一个单一完成比例、配额使用率或目标达成率时用它，例如迁移进度、课程完成度或季度目标；若要比较多个比例，用条形图或多指标面板；若要展示随时间变化，用折线图。
why_valuable: 单个关键比例埋在文字或表格里不容易形成视觉焦点；本组件用一个可访问的圆环、中央数值、短标签与说明建立清晰层级，并把输入统一归一化到 value/max。

data_in.note: data 表示一个部分/整体比例。value 会夹到 0–max，max 必须大于 0且默认 100；圆环按 value/max 绘制。centerLabel 仅改变中央显示文字，不改变实际进度或无障碍数值。tone 控制圆环和状态 pill 的语义色。

schema.title?: string —— 卡片标题；省略时显示 “Progress”
schema.max?: number —— 总量，必须大于 0，默认 100
schema.centerLabel?: string —— 圆心主文本；省略时显示计算出的百分比
schema.label?: string —— 圆心主文本下的短标签，也作为进度条无障碍名称
schema.caption?: string —— 圆环下方的一至两句上下文
schema.status?: string —— 可选状态 pill 文本
schema.tone?: 'accent'|'positive'|'warning'|'negative' —— 圆环与状态的语义色，默认 accent

spec.note: 单卡片随标题、caption 和 status 自动增高，圆环最大约 230px 且在窄屏内缩放；无固定高度、vh 或载体测量。

example._why: 73/100 的季度目标配合明确中心标签、说明和正向状态，可验证圆弧计算、完整文案层级和语义色。

minimal.title: Quarterly roadmap
minimal.label: Milestones complete
minimal.caption: 11 of 15 committed milestones are shipped. Two more are currently in review.

uplink: 纯 display，无 uplink；圆环只展示 value/max 的本地计算结果，没有输入、选择或提交行为。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero imports/fetch/events/global footprint; SVG ring rendered-verified
